title: Player Heads into Plushies
description: A resource pack that replaces player heads with plushies
body:
**This resource pack requires optifine or software that has optifine features like EMF**
 **This pack will NOT work without them**

## Description
- A self explanitory pack just replaces the player head model with a custom full body plushie
- Skins are mapped onto the plushie 


## Notes
- The player head hitbox isn't changed
- Certain skins won't look perfect on the plushies because of the cutoff


Made in blockbench
 Any bugs/questions? Dm me on discord at Toppz#3451
